programme.title: The Wrath Of Cain
programme.desc: Cain's often challenged in prison by wannabes. Cain's later offered a chance to talk with kids from the hood, incl. his own son, so they don't end up in prison.

programme.title: Containment
programme.desc: What happens when an epidemic breaks out, but you're kept in the dark? Anything can happen. Slowly the residents realize that they will all die unless they come together.

programme.title: Adormidera
programme.desc: A group of five surviving soldiers in the late 1300's are returning home, however along the journey they encounter an unforeseen turn of events.

programme.title: Iceland 63 66 N
programme.desc: Experience Iceland from a unique perspective - the third part of our journey shows the country from above

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Love's Portrait
programme.desc: Lily, a museum curator, discovers a painting that looks just like her and is sent to find where the painting came from and who painted it. She tracks the painting down to the post office it was sent from in Ireland. There she meets William and Saoirse, a brother-sister duo who run the post, and who offer her help and friendship on her quest. But William knows more than he's letting on. Will he reveal what he knows if it risks his growing relationship--and mutual love--with Lily?

programme.title: Destined At Christmas
programme.desc: Two people meet on Black Friday, get separated, and yearn to reunite—if only they knew each other's last names and numbers. Can destiny help them find each other by Christmas?

programme.title: Midway to Love
programme.desc: When the network announces that her television therapy show is changing to a tabloid shock-fest, a straight laced and caring psychologist returns to her hometown and reunites with her high school sweetheart while finally realizing that having someone to share a life with is more important than fame and the excitement of the city.

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: When a sudden spurt of murders occurs in Texas Big Bend country, suspicion immediately falls on a young drifter who just moved to the area.

programme.title: I'll Die for Vengeance
programme.desc: A Mexican gang headed by vicious Pedro terrorizes the land between New Mexico and Arizona.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger and the Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Three Indians are murdered. Each was wearing a medallion when he died.

programme.title: Git Along Little Dogies
programme.desc: When war breaks out between oilmen and cattle ranchers, Gene sides with the ranchers until he learns that oil will bring a railroad to town.

programme.title: The White, the Yellow, and the Black
programme.desc: In the 19th century, when the Japanese Emperor sends a gift pony to the US President it gets stolen and ransomed by Indians but Sheriff Gideon aided by an inept Japanese servant offers to deliver the ransom.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: Known as a “fixer” for difficult clients, a talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to dazzle the mayor and save his company. Wil the "fixer" fix something more than just the company?

programme.title: Dognapped: Hound for the Holidays
programme.desc: An assistant of an influencer and a charming vet bond to find a missy puppy before Christmas.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: Sincerely, Yours Truly
programme.desc: When Hayley finds a wedding ring with a letter hidden in a drawer in her new condo, she decides to write back… and the mysterious lover replies, starting a chain of letters and events that will change her life for ever!

programme.title: Christmas Together
programme.desc: A woman leaves New York for LA after a break-up and falls in love while renting the guest house of a young father.

programme.title: Dark Crimes
programme.desc: When a disgraced detective Tadek notices the stark similarities between a murder case and a crime novel written by Kozlow (Marton Csokas), he sees an opportunity to redeem his career. Digging deeper Tadek is soon caught up in a game of cat and mouse, that will reveal a dark truth.

programme.title: Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Hilarity, romance and festive spirit prevail, when six New Yorkers get trapped in an elevator on Christmas Eve! Forcing a heartless real estate tycoon, a crass HR manager, his ex-employee and a cynical doctor to reconsider the way they think about others.

programme.title: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: The perfect Christmas story for all the family. Join eight-year old Julius as he embarks on a magical journey! Growing up in an orphanage, Julius has always been a bit of an outsider. However, one day he is wondrously transported to a frosty and enchanted world where, with the help of Herman the marzipan pig and Sophina the glass angel, he sets off to save Santa from the wicked hands of Crampus.

programme.title: Somewhere In Palilula
programme.desc: Somewhere in Palilula is placed in the 60s in Romania and tells the story of Serafim, a fresh graduate of medical school, brought by a gloomy whim of destiny to the town of Palilula.

programme.title: Speak Easily
programme.desc: A timid professor inherits a large sum of money and decides to fund a terrible musical.

programme.title: Banjo Farid
programme.desc: Farid, 12 years old, is an enigma to others. Quiet and original, he seems to be experiencing daily life without feeling any emotion. However, one day, against all expectations, he will change thanks to an improbable musical instrument.

programme.title: The War Is Over
programme.desc: Following the bombardment of Kosovo in 1999, the Rahmanis and their three children emigrate to Switzerland. After years of living in their new homeland, the family faces the prospects of deportation.

programme.title: Suddenly
programme.desc: In the city of Suddenly, three gangsters trap the Benson family in their own house, on the top of a hill nearby the railroad station, with the intention of killing the president of the USA.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: When kickboxing champ Eric Sloane is crippled in the ring by the evil Tong Po, Eric's younger brother, Kurt, seeks vengeance.

programme.title: The Colony
programme.desc: Beneath the icy surface, survivors of Colony Seven struggle as food supplies dwindle and temperatures drop. Plagued by illness, the colonists suspect the worst when they mysteriously lose contact with Colony Five, the only other known settlement

programme.title: Crank 2 High Voltage
programme.desc: In this high-octane sequel, hitman Chev Chelios (Statham) launches himself on an electrifying chase through Los Angeles in pursuit of the Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Infinitum: Subject Unknown
programme.desc: A mind-bending slice of British science fiction, featuring Sir Ian McKellan and Conleth Hill. Jane is trapped in a parallel universe and is forced to find a way to alter her reality before it is too late.

programme.title: Blue World Order
programme.desc: The film is set in a post-apocalyptic world in which civilisation has crumbled. A massive electromagnetic pulse has killed all children on the planet with the exception of Molly (Billie Rutherford), the daughter of Jake Slater (Jake Ryan).

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: The Past Never Dies
programme.desc: CASEY MARSH was born in captivity. Her mother, JANE, was abducted as a teenager and gave birth to Casey while she was being held by the kidnapper, TIMOTHY FAST. Jane eventually escaped when Casey was 6 years old. Timothy Fast was arrested and incarcerated. Ever since, Jane has struggled to regain a normal life for her and her daughter. For Casey, the memories of a childhood in captivity still haunt her. Jane, on the other hand, has seemingly moved on. She has re-married and is happy. When a number of local women start to go missing, Jane reveals to Casey that Timothy might have had an accomplice and wonders if he is involved. The kidnapping M.O. is eerily similar. Casey is furious that her mother has hidden this knowledge from her all this time. Then, Jane suddenly disappears. Has she been kidnapped again? Casey must face the demons of her past in order to find her mother before it's too late.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after putting a receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: Aberrant
programme.desc: Cole (Jack Quaid) stirs everyone up during his best friend's wedding as something seems off between him and the bride.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: After the Reality
programme.desc: The life of a contestant (Matthew Morrison) on a Bachelorette style reality show is thrown into turmoil when the sudden death of his father forces him to quit the series prematurely and reconnect with his estranged sister at the family cabin.

programme.title: Comet
programme.desc: Comet explores the six-year relationship between Dell and Kimberly, as it skips around between five pivotal moments.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans...

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: When Seattle interior designer Lily Summers returns to her hometown to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast, she meets Marcus, the handsome seaplane pilot whose life's work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: The Condemned 2
programme.desc: In the revamped Condemned Tournament, convicts must fight to the death in a game broadcast to the public.

programme.title: The Prince
programme.desc: When his daughter is kidnapped, a retired assassin is drawn back into the life he gave up.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Nine criminals are placed on an island. Only the last person alive in 30 hours leaves the island.

programme.title: F6: Twister
programme.desc: On Christmas Day a Texas area is struck by a massive storm system sprouting several severe tornadoes.

programme.title: How to Ruin the Holidays
programme.desc: A festive family caper starring Amber Nash (Archer, Mr. Robot) as a struggling comedian who reluctantly returns home for Christmas. Upon her arrival, she must not only deal with her eccentric and wildly dysfunctional family, but ultimately has a life-changing decision to make about her father and special-needs brother.

programme.title: Rare Exports: A Christmas Tale
programme.desc: Do you believe in Santa Claus? On the eve of Christmas a young boy sets out to discover the truth behind several strange goings on in his small isolated village. Why have all the reindeer been slaughtered? Who took all the hairdryers and radiators? And where have all the children gone? Seal the chimney. Lock the doors. Hide your children. This year the real Santa Claus is coming to town.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina and Franklin are seemingly the perfect couple, but after five years of marriage, a huge fight at Thanksgiving leads them to divorce, set to be finalised on Christmas day. As they try to move on with their lives, will the festive spirit pull them back together? Starring Erica Ash (Scary Movie 5, Survivor's Remorse) and Eva Marcille (The Young and the Restless).

programme.title: Christmas With a Crown
programme.desc: When a successful woman returns to her hometown to revive her family's Christmas festival, she meets a dashing stranger who's volunteered to help organise the event. Sparks begin to fly between them, but little does she know that he's really a prince in disguise, longing to find the true spirit of the holidays! It will take a Christmas miracle of royal proportions for their hearts to meet as one.

programme.title: 12 Dogs of Christmas
programme.desc: A girl who uses dogs to teach people about the true meaning of Christmas during the Depression.

programme.title: All She Wants for Christmas
programme.desc: Noelle Dunn is ready to leave her charming small town for the big city.

programme.title: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: True story inspiration: Wesley's gift impacts Megan's life.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: Mrs. Claus goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: All She Wants for Christmas
programme.desc: Noelle Dunn is ready to leave her charming small town for the big city.

programme.title: Prey
programme.desc: Described as Donnie Darko meets Lost and from legendary production company Blumhouse. After the tragic death of his father, millennial Toby (Logan Miller: Escape Room) is begrudgingly enrolled in a program where he must spend time on a remote island. After meeting mysterious Madeleine (Kristine Froseth: The Society), Toby realises neither of them are safe and something bloodthirsty is lurking.

programme.title: Dark Crimes
programme.desc: From the executive producers of The Revenant, Jim Carrey commands the screen in this spellbinding thriller. When a disgraced detective Tadek notices the stark similarities between a murder case and a crime novel written by Kozlow (Marton Csokas), he sees an opportunity to redeem his career. Digging deeper Tadek is soon caught up in a game of cat and mouse, that will reveal a dark truth! Gripping!

programme.title: Devils of War
programme.desc: Poland 1944. A daring team of Special Forces soldiers are called by President Roosevelt. Their top-secret rescue mission, to stage a daring raid on a fortress, where the Nazis are kidnapping women and experimenting with the occult to raise a demon army. But the soldiers soon find themselves trapped deep behind enemy lines in deadly circumstances.

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris, assembling an all-star cast including Timothée Chalamet, Elle Fanning, Selena Gomez, Jude Law, Diego Luna and Liev Schreiber, for a charming, comedic tale set amidst the dizzying streets of The Big Apple, as romantic weekend plans are soon dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns to showers.

programme.title: Reunited at Christmas
programme.desc: A successful writer returns to her late grandmother's home for a family reunion with the task of penning a Christmas novel. Starring Nikki Deloach (2018)

programme.title: Love Always Santa
programme.desc: A struggling writer finds inspiration, and possibly romance, when he finds a letter to Santa from a woman asking for her lonely mother to find love again. Stars Marguerite Moreau, Mike Faiola (2016)

programme.title: Christmas in Toyland
programme.desc: A data analyst for a toy company tries to save hundreds of jobs right before Christmas to help keep the in-person experience alive. Starring Vanessa Lengies (2022)

programme.title: Baking All The Way
programme.desc: A pastry chef arrives in Wisconsin to convince a baker to give her his gingerbread recipe for her new cookbook. Starring Cory Lee (2022)

programme.title: Candy Cane Christmas
programme.desc: A woman searches for a new tradition to lift her holiday spirits when her neighbours decide to skip the annual Christmas decoration festivities. Starring Beverley Mitchell (2020)

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: Unlucky in love Abbey opens her heart in a letter and puts it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out. Starring Bethany Joy Lenz (2019)

programme.title: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: Jamie Spellman struggles to balance her dream of painting with the reality of such a difficult career choice, while having to choose between two men who seem perfect, but for very different reasons.

programme.title: Love at The Ranch
programme.desc: Journalist Allison Sawyer visits the remote Clybourne Ranch, the setting of her favourite author's books. Starring Laura Mitchell (2021)

programme.title: CLIMBING HIGH
programme.desc: Diana gets a job in a modelling agency where she meets a wealthy young man, Nicky. Diana's brother is determined that Nicky will marry his sister and the trio set off on a climbing trip together. Will all be resolved?

programme.title: CRACKERJACK
programme.desc: A modern-day Robin Hood is thrilling England by stealing from the rich and giving to the poor. When he unintentionally witnesses a robbery, he becomes aware that a gang of crooks are framing him as the culprit. Will he be able to outwit them?

programme.title: Catch Us If You Can
programme.desc: A free-wheeling, skylarking film about the attempted escape of two youngsters from the fiercely artificial world in which they have become trapped. Steve and his four friends - Lenny, Mike, Rick and Dennis - manage to persuade Dinah, symbol of a nationwide 'Eat Meat' advertising campaign, to escape from the false values of the commercial world.

programme.title: It's Great to Be Young!
programme.desc: t's heaven at Angel Hill Grammar School until the arrival of the new headmaster, Mr. Frome, who prohibits sixth formers from their beloved music making.

programme.title: Looking on the Bright Side
programme.desc: A hairdresser's assistant has a gift for song writing, whilst his sweetheart, Gracie, a manicurist, has a promising voice.

programme.title: Last Looks
programme.desc: Last Looks is a pacy and star-studded homicide mystery set in the heart of Hollywood. Alistair Pinch (Mel Gibson), is an eccentric but successful actor who spends his days drunk living the high-life in Hollywood. When his wife is found dead he becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to prove his innocence, a skilled police negotiator accused of corruption and murder takes hostages in a government office to gain the time he needs to find the truth.

programme.title: Night Train To Lisbon
programme.desc: Raimund is a Latin teacher and an ancient languages expert. His life is transformed by a young woman on a bridge in the Swiss city of Bern, whom he saves from jumping to her death in the waters below.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Set in New Orleans, this is the story of a mysterious man, Nick Easter. Nick gets himself not only on the jury of a landmark case against a gun manufacturer, but as the foreman, in an attempt to influence the other jury members to vote a certain way.

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: A young prince battles aliens and sorcerers to rescue his princess from the Beast on the fantastic planet Krull.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this fun-filled action-adventure.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A woman verging on thirty and frustrated in a temp secretary job takes on a yearlong culinary quest: cook all 524 recipes in Julia Child's "Mastering the Art of French Cooking." She chronicles her trials and tribulations in a blog that catches on with the food crowd.

programme.title: The Animal (2001)
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: California Suite
programme.desc: CALIFORNIA SUITE is Neil Simon's laugh-drenched adaptation of his hit Broadway play. Intertwining stories set in the Beverly Hills Hotel include an English actress in L.A. attending the Oscars a divorced couple concerned about the future of their daughter a philandering husband who must explain a hooker to his wife and two couples on the worst vacation imaginable.

programme.title: The Meddler
programme.desc: An aging widow from New York City follows her daughter to Los Angeles in hopes of starting a new life after her husband passes away.

programme.title: Ishtar
programme.desc: With a song in their hearts, the CIA on their backs, a gorgeous revolutionary in their arms and two nations after their heads, Warren Beatty and Dustin Hoffman find adventure, romance and comedy on the road to ISHTAR. Isabelle Adjani is the female lead and Elaine May is the writer and director.

programme.title: Eden
programme.desc: Spanning two decades across Paris, New York and Chicago, Eden is an epic story of euphoria, melancholy and passion.

programme.title: Manifesto
programme.desc: "Manifesto" pays homage to the moving tradition and literary beauty of artistic manifestos, ultimately questioning the role of the artist in society today.

programme.title: Death Of A Salesman
programme.desc: Willy Loman is an aging, traveling salesman, who despairs that his life his been lived in vain.

programme.title: The Minute You Wake Up Dead
programme.desc: AS THE BODIES PILE UP, HIS WORLD WILL FALL APART. An investment banker in small town America finds one mistake could cost him his life as his clients lose vast amounts of money. As the threats begin to pile in, one call asks “Where will you be the minute you wake up dead?”.

programme.title: The Prince
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, John Cusack and Jason Patric face off in this action-packed thriller. A retired assassin is drawn back into the life he gave up when his daughter is kidnapped. To rescue her, he must confront his former rival.

programme.title: Setup
programme.desc: After carrying out a heist, a man is betrayed by his friend and accomplice. He vows to get revenge, joining forced with a ruthless crime lord in the process.

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah (Isabelle Allen), is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers
programme.desc: Germany, May 1945, deep in the Harz Mountains a U.S. tank crew discovers a platoon of Germans preparing to ambush U.S. supply trucks. A deadly game of cat and mouse quickly unfolds as the Americans find themselves out-gunned and out-manned by three German tanks.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: The Story of Europe
programme.desc: The Story of Europe - State of Play: Europe has never experienced such a long period of peace and prosperity as after the Second World War. When the Iron Curtain falls in 1989, the dream of a Europe united in peace and freedom seems finally to become reality. But whether financial or refugee crisis - the European euphoria has disappeared, nationalists are on the rise again.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”, the biggest aircraft in WWII. The finding is a sensation. None of Hitler's mega planes has survived the war, and no other wreck has ever been found.

programme.title: Signs of Evil
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS, Hitler's Schutzstaffel, stands for terror and the murder of millions. The penniless graphic artist Walter Heck was given the job of designing the jagged, rune-like characters in 1929. The “sig” rune was rooted deep in the ideological cosmos of the Nazis and their supporters. They saw themselves as the descendants of the Teutons and declared the runes to be humanity's original Germanic script. The symbol was meant to unite Heinrich Himmler's “Black Order.” But did it escape their notice that it was originally of Semitic origin? In October 1945, the Allies passed a law banning the Nazi Party and all associated organizations, including the SS. The young Federal Republic even forbade all Nazi symbols. This documentary tells the gripping story of the SS symbol, from the Middle Ages to the present day.

programme.title: War Crimes of the Liberators
programme.desc: US soldiers fought for democracy and the freedom of other nations. Yet in the course of military operations, they too committed war crimes. Most of them never followed up on let alone punished. In the wake of the Allies' advance against Hitler's tyranny, there were numerous atrocities committed by the victors, not only in the East. Apart from their medals, some American soldiers also kept a dark secret. GIs killed German Prisoners of War and raped thousands of German women. Estimates of the number of German victims vary widely, and are highly disputed among experts. Not least because they touch on a taboo, since for decades in Germany the subject had been considered as a potential strain on the relation between the Federal Republic of Germany and its Western Allies. According to some historians there were several thousand sexual assaults by American soldiers in Bavaria alone when US forces liberated the region in April 1945. At some invasion beaches in Normandy, only every second germen POW survived. Often, the liberators – shocked by the sight of German atrocities – would fall into a spiral of violence. Very few of these crimes came under investigation by US military courts. Studies by the US War Department hinting at a comparatively high number of transgressions were classified secret.

programme.title: China's Schindlers
programme.desc: These are two stories rarely told that should never be forgotten: The stories of China's Schindlers - two courageous men who stood up for human decency as evil engulfed the world. Chinese diplomat Dr. Feng Shan Ho was Consul-General in Vienna, Austria in the late 1930s. Disturbed by the Nazis' persecution of Viennese Jews, Feng Shan Ho gave visas to Jews desperate enough to escape Hitler, and that allowed them to immigrate to Shanghai when no other nation would accept them. German businessman John Rabe lived in China for 30 years. In 1937, after Japanese troops invaded his adopted city of Nanking, Rabe could not bear to witness the horrors and atrocities around him. Under the protection of the Nazi flag, he led the establishment of a Safety Zone protecting 200,000 innocent Chinese. Diaries & letters left behind are among some of the only evidence left of those who endured unspeakable horrors and bravely sacrificed for their fellow man. Those diaries, along with the voices of survivors tell not only of the darkness and terror, but also of the heroism, bravery and sacrifice of a few individuals whose character and courage stand as beacons of the human spirit. We illustrate the complex nature of the political positions of Germany, Japan, and China during WWII, highlighting Germany's acknowledgement of its wartime actions in an effort to heal relationships with the Jewish people and other neighboring countries. Experts discuss the positive impact that this has had on Germany socially and economically and how this strategy could benefit the Japanese and Chinese economic partnership and promote friendship in future generations. The West often overlooks China in the story of WWII. The Chinese people suffered horrors and atrocities that still haunt survivors. They bear witness to past brutality and endure emotional wounds that have never healed.

programme.title: The Battle for the Baltic Sea
programme.desc: It's in spring 2008, when the telephone of the Archaeological State Office Schleswig-Holstein suddenly rings. The message archeologist Martin Segschneider receives makes him curious.

programme.title: Osama Bin Laden
programme.desc: Just after midnight on May 2, 2011, United States Special Forces raided the compound in Abbottabad, Pakistan, where Osama Bin laden had been hiding for years. “America's public enemy number one” was killed during the operation. The Navy SEALs thoroughly searched his house, recovering everything that could provide information about Bin Laden and his terrorist network Al-Qaeda: His documents and private correspondence, as well as every electronic data carrier.

programme.desc: A down-and-out filmmaker and his best friend embark on a wild quest. Their destination: Mexico, 3,000 miles away. Their mission: to find a way to save the endangered monarch butterfly, and maybe themselves, from disappearing forever.

programme.title: Inseparable
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the captivating journey of three extraordinary Indigenous women who not only excel in their chosen sport, but also become beacons of hope, cultural preservation, and Indigenous rights advocacy.

programme.title: The Climate Planet
programme.desc: Through a vibrant mix of pictures, visuals, and animations, we break down the basic principles of climate science.

programme.title: Golden Age: Milos at Blenheim Palace
programme.desc: Discover the ethereal style of baroque music by renowned classical guitarist Miloš, who gives a live performance amidst the historic grandeur of Blenheim Palace and its lavish grounds.

programme.title: Ennio: El maestro
programme.desc: Giuseppe Tornatore pays tribute to Ennio Morricone, retracing the life and works of the legendary composer, from his debut with Sergio Leone to the Oscar-winning 'The Hateful Eight'.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen: Klimt and The Kiss
programme.desc: Painted in Vienna around 1908, the evocative image of an unknown embracing couple has captivated viewers. Experts examine the qualities that make Gustav Klimt's 'The Kiss' an iconic and enduring work.

programme.title: Landmark: Scotland Heat
programme.desc: Annie, Kevin, and Michael compete to win the Scottish heat with their epic sculptures, with Kevin hoping that his gigantic abstract object will impress over Michael's environmental art.

programme.title: On Broadway
programme.desc: Actors Hugh Jackman, Helen Mirren, Alec Baldwin and others reveal how Broadway came back from the brink to help save New York City.

programme.title: Lions Rule
programme.desc: On the African plains lions rule. They're not the biggest or fastest animals around, but stealth, teamwork and the strength of the pride means they almost always come out on top.

programme.title: Meet The Marsupials
programme.desc: Few countries have a more iconic representative in the animal kingdom than Australia and the marsupial. Marsupials were once found across the planet, but over time they found their way to the outback, leaving Australia as an ark carrying the future of pouch mammals. As varied as they are unusual, marsupials are a weird and wonderful mob of animals who carry their young in a pouch. Whether hopping, climbing or even airborne, marsupials are some of the strangest but most fascinating creatures you're likely to meet.

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Nature's Cutest
programme.desc: As we all know the natural world can be tough and challenging at times, but it can also be nothing short of adorable.

programme.title: What A Colourful World
programme.desc: ‘What a Colourful World' takes the viewer on a journey around the globe to discover a host of colourful creatures that make our world such a spectacularly diverse place. Seen from space, Earth may appear mainly green and blue, but a closer look reveals the true abundance of hues and shades caused by light refraction. From giant humpback whales to tiny dancing spiders, from pink flamingos to blue-footed boobies, from strange-looking mandrills to frantic fiddler crabs – we explore what makes our globe such a kaleidoscope of colour.

programme.title: Giant Appetites
programme.desc: In an ever changing world food is one of the few constants – it's the driver for almost anything that creatures do. Appetites vary from species to species, but some seem to take more than their fair share

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: The Elwha River in Washington State was once a major spawning ground for Pacific salmon – until it was dammed in the early 20th century to help generate power for the logging industry. A century-long campaign to take down the dams climaxed in 2011with the largest dam removal project in history.

programme.title: Hidden Australia
programme.desc: Sometimes called the biggest island on Earth, Australia is a sub-continent of incredible diversity, beauty, danger and downright weirdness. The 4,000km between the coasts are made up of a patchwork of contrasting landscapes: tropical rainforests, snow-capped mountains, dry woodland, giant wetlands, tropical reefs and hostile desert. These vast tracts of wilderness boast the world's most unique and bizarre wildlife communities. In this ‘hidden' Australia, there is an astonishing surprise at every turn.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The Wismar Bay is unique in its diversity on the Mecklenburg Baltic Sea coast: cliffs, sandy beaches, salt marshes, enchanted islands and, last but not least, the proud Hanseatic city of Wismar with its brick Gothic buildings, which are a UNESCO World Heritage Site. When the mighty logs get wedged together in the timber mill in the port of Wismar, Steven Buchholz has to get to work with his chainsaw. It's a dangerous job, because the logs weigh tons. As a trained carpenter, Steven is a virtuoso with the chain saw. Even after his shift is over, he is looking for the thrill: the wind off his home island of Poel is favorable that day and he wants to reclaim the German record in the kite surfing high jump. For a long time, Ramona Stelzer only knew fish as a tasty ingredient between two halves of a bun. But when the goldsmith got her hands on fish leather, her business idea was born: she processes the unique natural product fish skin into fine jewelry. The problem is that hardly anyone in Germany tans fish skin. In order to reliably obtain supplies, Ramona now wants to learn this craft herself.

programme.title: Lunenburg: Where the Land Meets the Sea
programme.desc: On the east coast of Canada, a place whose name sounds strangely familiar. The small town of Lunenburg, west of Halifax, was founded in 1753 by North German immigrants. Today, the idyllic town with its many wooden houses is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. In the 19th century, Lunenburg was one of the richest towns in the British Empire, becoming prosperous through fishing and shipbuilding. Glenn Rhodenizer's family traces back ten generations directly to German immigrants. And what the Rhodenizers primarily grow on their fields directly by the sea could hardly be more typical: it is white cabbage, which the farming family processes into sauerkraut. Sauerkraut can be found in every restaurant and supermarket in this area it is the specialty of the region. The heritage of wooden boat building is successfully maintained by David Westergard. In his ancient shed, he is assembling a 20-meter schooner from four different types of local wood. Building wooden boats, he says, is like "slow food": sustainable, conscious, environmentally friendly, waste-free.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Jersey: the Channel Island is one of the areas in the UK that can boast the most hours of annual sunshine. Not that Dave Cowburn cares very much. He works in the dark, cool ducts of an old bunker from the Sec-ond World War. Here, he breeds turbot, and is very successful at it, too. The "Jersey Royal", the regal potato, has been grown on the island since 1880, fertilized with seaweed from the surrounding ocean. In the third generation, Christine Hellio manages approximately 20 hectares on the coast. "The potato is our most important export commodity", she says. It is harvested by hand, as machines cannot be used on the steep fields. The price is quite regal, too: One kilogram costs 6 Euros. Hugh Gill is one of around 240 voluntary police officers on Jersey. The Honorary Police is regarded as the oldest organised police system in the world. Hugh works for them for one week every month. On the green lanes, the streets of Jersey, the speed limit is 15 miles per hour. Jersey has an immense tidal range and with up to 13 metres difference, it is the world's third largest. This is good for a rarity: the Ormer - one of the world's most expensive species of snail.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: In Newfoundland, at the easternmost tip of North America, the landscape is pristine, dramatic, and very sparsely populated. In summer, icebergs occasionally drift along the steep cliffs. When the "Titanic" collided with an iceberg and sank just 300 miles off the coast of Newfoundland in 1912, the last radio messages were picked up in a small wooden hut on the Avalon Peninsula. Today, most Newfoundlanders live on Avalon. There are particularly many seabirds here. In Witless Bay, the newborn puffins are ready for their first descent into the Atlantic. But some stray onto the coastal road, attracted by the lights of the hotels and restaurants. In doing so, they run the risk of being run over. A team of volunteers saves the lives of countless young birds: The Puffin & Petrel Patrol goes out at night dressed in high-visibility vests to collect the puffins. Biologist Sabrina Wilhelm then brings them back to Green Island, home to the largest puffin colony in North America. Here, the birds catch up on what they should have done long ago: the first dive of their lives.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Gigantic fjords and over 5,000 small islands: In Alaska's south there's a lot of wilderness and little civilization. The region between the capital Juneau and the Canadian border is also known by locals as the "Last Frontier", the last outpost. Michelle Masden, for example, has come to terms with the harsh conditions here. She is the only seaplane pilot in the region. She earns her living with her 65-year-old Beaver: as an air taxi, transport plane and now and then as a rescuer in last necessity. Michelle flies anything and everything: spare parts and food, doctors, hikers and hunters. For the fishermen of southern Alaska she searches for large shoals of fish and guides the captains to the next good catch. Ray Rusaw was a car mechanic by profession, but in his old age he was gripped by gold fever. With a self-built special raft and a highly creative selection of equipment from the DIY store, he sets off in search of the precious metal that his predecessors overlooked two centuries ago. For four years he has been happily obsessively combing through sandbanks and river courses. For Ray, the search for gold has little to do with luck and much to do with meticulous research. He is certain that he has found the perfect spot.

programme.title: Cuba to Go
programme.desc: Ever since the embargo was lifted in the summer of 2015, Cuba's popularity has been steadily increasing.

programme.title: Cuba to Go
programme.desc: Ever since the embargo was lifted in the summer of 2015, Cuba's popularity has been steadily increasing.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.sub-title: The Caribbean for explorers: St. Vincent and the Grenadines
programme.desc: Much more Caribbean than on the islands of St. Vincent and the Grenadines is hardly possible. Deserted beaches, uninhabited islands, lush vegetation, the 33 islands in total are dreamlike with extremely hospitable inhabitants. Miranda Phillips runs a laundry and water boat on Bequia. Every morning, the 32-year-old navigates from yacht to yacht with her small bright green service vehicle and is already expected by most skippers. Miranda promises radiantly fresh laundry, which she delivers again the same day. And so there is always something going on in her tiny laundrette in the harbour. It turns into a karaoke bar in the evening, because that is Miranda's great passion. Eban Olliver has many jobs at once. He is the lighthouse keeper of Kingstown. And that means a lot of responsibility in St. Vincent's biggest port city. Because Eban doesn't just change the light bulbs, he's a pilot dispatcher, harbour master and guard all in one person. First contact with ships is particularly important. Once he even saved the entire nation from an Ebola virus.

programme.title: Circus In The Sky

programme.title: Black Bear at the Edge of the World

programme.desc: Two divers make unprecedented discoveries deep within the lair of the Nile crocodile.

programme.title: Cheetahs Of The Deep

programme.title: Dolphins

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue

programme.desc: Locked in small cages and used as attractions at small private zoos and even local restaurants, the future of 15 Kosovo bears is bleak if animal rescue organisation FOUR PAWS doesn't take action.

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.desc: We follow FOUR PAWS' efforts to give captive lions a better life. A family of five lions who suffered a harsh life in a Romanian zoo, are given a new home, and a new lease on life and we take a look at a shocking, yet legal industry.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: The true meaning of conservation manifests when man and nature unite – separation is not an option. This episode focuses on the human involvement in what used to be a natural process.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: In this episode we relocate two of the largest antelope species in Africa, the Kudu and the Waterbuck. Both these species require a helicopter and very competent ground crew.

programme.title: Modern Migrations

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: One of the smallest antelope species – the red duiker thrives in the sub-tropical bushveld of the Kwa-Zulu Natal province. This very sensitive animal will be captured in nets, gently removed, and sent on their way to a new home.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: For this episode we will travel to the Entabeni Safari Conservancy where a special family of African elephant awaits relocation. The family will be moved from a private conservation area as they have reached the carrying capacity of that area.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: With a high reproduction rate that leads to large numbers on reserves and are the staple diet for predators that keep their numbers in check. See how these highly adapted and unique animals get loaded and gently treated to “migrate” to a new home.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There's a whole world and more than one spectrum of sensations that animals are aware of, yet which just pass humans by. There's a kind of “sixth sense” that some animals have which still defies explanation.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it's about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT.
